Name: Vercel
Description: The platform for frontend developers. Deploy your Next.js and React web applications instantly with zero configuration. Supports serverless edge functions CI/CD and automatic HTTPS for every deploy.

Name: Tabnine
Description: AI code assistant that provides intelligent autocomplete and boilerplate code generation directly inside VS Code and JetBrains. Trained on your codebase for context-aware suggestions that accelerate debugging and eliminate repetitive coding.
